stemHtml: Aircraft A is at FL170 and requests descent to FL160. ATC informs that FL160 is occupied by Aircraft B. 3 minutes later, Aircraft B requests descent to FL120 and reports vacating FL160. Under which condition may ATC delay the clearance for Aircraft A to descend to FL160?

options.a: If Aircraft A has a significantly higher rate of descent than Aircraft B.
options.b: If Aircraft B has a significantly higher rate of descent than Aircraft A.
options.c: If Aircraft A is not equipped with CPDLC.
options.d: If Aircraft A has an inoperative SSR transponder.
